key.name: light-time
key.summary: Time to switch to light theme

key.name: dark-time
key.summary: Time to switch to dark theme

key.name: gtk-light-theme
key.summary: GTK3/legacy theme name to use for light mode

key.name: gtk-dark-theme
key.summary: GTK3/legacy theme name to use for dark mode

key.name: shell-light-theme
key.summary: Shell theme name (org.gnome.shell.extensions.user-theme) for light mode

key.name: shell-dark-theme
key.summary: Shell theme name (org.gnome.shell.extensions.user-theme) for dark mode

key.name: apply-libadwaita-fix
key.summary: Re-link ~/.config/gtk-4.0 files to the active variant's gtk-4.0 dir
key.description: Fixes GTK4/libadwaita apps (Files, Settings, Extensions, Tweaks) not following the legacy theme

key.name: apply-custom-css
key.summary: Append the custom CSS block below to gtk.css / gtk-dark.css

key.name: custom-css
key.summary: Custom CSS appended to the libadwaita theme files

key.name: restart-apps
key.summary: Quit Nautilus / gnome-control-center / Extensions app after a switch
key.description: So the new theme is visible immediately instead of on next launch

key.name: apply-qt-fix
key.summary: Also switch the qt5ct/qt6ct "style" on each theme switch
key.description: Writes ~/.config/qt5ct/qt5ct.conf and qt6ct.conf directly; requires qt5ct/qt6ct to already be set up

key.name: qt-light-style
key.summary: qt5ct/qt6ct style name to use for light mode
key.description: Must match a style name available in qt5ct's Appearance tab, e.g. Adwaita, Fusion, Breeze, kvantum

key.name: qt-dark-style
key.summary: qt5ct/qt6ct style name to use for dark mode

key.name: last-mode
key.summary: Internal: last mode applied ("light"/"dark"), used to avoid redundant re-applies
